\cvrow{RESEARCH\\INTERESTS}{%
  \vspace{-8pt}
  \parbox[t]{0.48\rcolwidth}{%
    \begin{itemize}
    \item Safe Reinforcement Learning
    \item Hardware Deployment
    \item Unmanned Ground and Aerial Vehicles
    \end{itemize}%
  }%
  \hfill
  \parbox[t]{0.48\rcolwidth}{%
    \begin{itemize}
    \item Advanced Nonlinear Control
    \item Learning-Based Control
    \item Trajectory Generation and Planning
    \end{itemize}%
  }%
}
